import React from 'react';
import { BrowserRouter as Router, Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom';
import Nav from './Nav';
import Main from './Main';
import Menu from './Menu';
import RelatedItems from './RelatedItems';
import Login from './Login';
import Signup from './Signup';

import './App.css';

const restaurants = [
    { id: 1, name: "Biryani", cuisine: "Biryani, Mughlai, North Indian", rating: 4.5, deliveryTime: "30-35 min", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563379091339-03b21ab4a4f8?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", priceForTwo: 400, discount: "50% OFF" },
    { id: 2, name: "Pizza", cuisine: "Pizza, Italian, Fast Food", rating: 4.3, deliveryTime: "25-30 min", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565299624946-b28f40a0ae38?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", priceForTwo: 500, discount: "30% OFF" },
    { id: 3, name: "South Indian", cuisine: "South Indian, Chinese, North Indian", rating: 4.6, deliveryTime: "35-40 min", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", priceForTwo: 350, discount: "40% OFF" },

    { id: 7, name: "Oatmeal Thick Shake", cuisine: "Oatmeal Thick Shake ", rating: 4.5, deliveryTime: "30-35 min", image: "https://th.bing.com/th/id/OIP.ZQSNicL23cN9bT4If8rebwHaLG?w=204&h=306&c=7&r=0&o=7&dpr=1.3&pid=1.7&rm=3" },

    { id: 11, name: "Chinese", cuisine: "Chinese, Asian, Noodles", rating: 4.4, deliveryTime: "25-30 min", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1569718212165-3a8278d5f624?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", priceForTwo: 300, discount: "35% OFF" },

function App() {
  return (
    <Router>
      <Nav />
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<Main restaurants={restaurants} />} />
        <Route path="/menu" element={<Menu />} />
        <Route path="/related" element={<RelatedItems />} />
        <Route path="/login" element={<Login />} />
        <Route path="/signup" element={<Signup />} />
      </Routes>
    </Router>
  );
}

export default App;
